project_type: TypeScript monorepo (pnpm workspaces + Turborepo) with 13 apps, 39 packages, 18 services
build_system: pnpm 10.28.1 + Turborepo. Each package has tsc for build, vitest for test, eslint for lint.
test_framework: Vitest (vitest run). Tests in src/__tests__/ directories within each package. Mock patterns with vi.fn() and interface-based DI.
verification_instructions: Run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm lint
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Docker available. Node.js 22+. No real Triton/CUDA needed - we create TypeScript service clients that talk to Triton via gRPC/HTTP.
contribution_requirements: Small reviewable diffs (<=500 LOC per PR). All gates: install, typecheck, test, build, lint, audit. Performance budgets are gates.
key_patterns: Interface-based DI (e.g., RedisClient, S3Client, OnnxBackend interfaces for mocking). Zod schemas for config validation. Barrel exports via index.ts. Tests use vitest describe/it/expect pattern with factory helpers.
directory_structure: apps/ (13 frontends+backends), packages/ (39 shared libs), services/ (18 infra workers), infra/ (helm, terraform, argocd, otel, grafana, prometheus), scripts/, k6/
